steps.title: Treat the expression as one value
steps.content:
The question asks for $9-3x$, so let $u=9-3x$. The equation becomes simpler.
$$6u+4=5u+19$$

steps.title: Solve for the target
steps.content:
Subtract $5u$ from both sides, then subtract $4$ from both sides.
$$u+4=19$$
$$u=15$$
The answer is D.
